body.text: [act. part. n. of 1]. It is said in a prov.,

body.text_bw: AlZ~amaA^u AlfaAdiHu A^ahowanu mina Alr~iY~i AlfaADiHi
body.text_ar: الظَّمَاُ الفَادِحُ اَهْوَنُ مِنَ الرِّىِّ الفَاضِحِ

body.text: Oppressing thirst is easier to bear than the state of satisfaction with drinking that disgraces,

body.text_bw: A_i*aA kaAna AlEu*oru waADiHFA kaAna AlEitaAbu
body.text_ar: اـِذَا كَانَ العُذْرُ وَاضِحًا كَانَ العِتَابُ

body.text: When the excuse is manifest, reproof is disgracing
because it exposes and manifests everything. (Har. p. 556.)
